description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden rowboat with a pointed bow and a flat stern, featuring a dark brown, weathered wood texture throughout its hull and interior. The boat is equipped with two simple wooden benches for seating and a curved wooden post at the bow, from which a black metal lantern is suspended. The lantern has a glass enclosure and a visible candle inside, adding a touch of old-world charm. The hull is angular and faceted, with visible wood grain and plank seams, giving it a handcrafted appearance. The interior is open and unobstructed, allowing for easy entry and seating. There are no visible oarlocks, motors, or sails, suggesting it is intended for manual rowing or decorative purposes.
description: A small, rustic wooden rowboat with a curved bow post holding a lantern and two wooden benches inside. The boat features a weathered wood texture and an open, handcrafted design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed bow, curved lantern post, and the two benches inside the boat.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow bow, lantern, and the arrangement of the benches within the open interior.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same curved lantern post and benches, with clear visibility of the hull's angular shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat stern and the full width of the boat, with the lantern and bow post visible in the distance.
